name: John Early
blurb: He starred in the TBS and HBO Max series Search Party and collaborated frequently with Kate Berlant, and his 2023 HBO special Now More Than Ever blends stand-up with song covers and mock-documentary sketches.
bio: John Early is an American comedian, actor, and singer whose work fuses arch character comedy, pop-star bravado, and musical performance. He starred in the TBS and HBO Max series Search Party and collaborated frequently with Kate Berlant, and his 2023 HBO special Now More Than Ever blends stand-up with song covers and mock-documentary sketches. He came up through the New York alternative comedy scene after studying acting at New York University.

timeline.ev: Would It Kill You to Laugh with Kate Berlant

First HBO stand-up special, Now More Than Ever (2023)

flags.bits_honest_gap_note: Only two embeddable official STAND-UP clips verified, both from his 2023 HBO special 'Now More Than Ever': 'Bowling is So Vulnerable' (full stage clip, HBO Max @hbomax) and the 'a-t-t-a-c-k-e-d' Short (@HBO). Below the 3-clip minimum. The special is a musical/sketch hybrid, so HBO posted few pure stand-up clips: the rest of the official YouTube footage is the trailer, official Britney/Neil Young music-video covers from the companion album (on his own channel @bejohnce and HBO), or talk-show appearances (Late Night with Seth Meyers, Conan/TeamCoco Britney impression) — none of which are stand-up sets. 'John Early Tortures His Parents' (udlQrpL5DoQ, an HBO clip) returns oembed 'Forbidden' (embedding disabled), so it was dropped. No official stand-up clips of 'Would It Kill You to Laugh' (a 2022 Peacock SKETCH special, not stand-up) exist beyond a trailer. Website johnearlyxxx.com live (200). IG official (@bejohnce, live 200). Honest gap.
